tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Revision of Days 21-30.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Revision of Days 21-30 का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I used to go to school daily. I could swim when I was a child. I should have come earlier. He must have worked very hard. I could have done this earlier.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Revision of Days 21-30.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Revision of Days 21-30 का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: If I had known, I would have come. He may have gone there. He might have gone, but I am not sure. I will come tomorrow. We ought to respect our parents.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "क्या तुम मुझे मदद कर सकते हो?"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "He must have worked very hard yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He must have worked very hard.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Revision of Days 21-30.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Revision of Days 21-30 का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He dared to say this. Shall I close the door? He used to smoke. She may have read this book.
